payload.answer: Denied. A normal user cannot execute administrative SQL or delete memory_cards. No memory was modified or deleted.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative SQL command from a normal user and does not provide a durable personal-memory fact to store.

details: Administrative SQL execution was not authorized.
DELETE FROM memory_cards was not executed.
No memory cards were created, updated, or deleted.

repair_options: If you need to delete your own memory, use an approved user-level deletion command or request.
If you are an administrator, authenticate through the proper admin channel before issuing maintenance commands.
